summary.brief: Microsoft Windows added to CISA KEV — confirmed in-the-wild exploitation. · 9 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.
bullets: Microsoft Windows added to CISA KEV — confirmed in-the-wild exploitation.
9 new critical disclosures — review patch status on exposed services.

digest.description: Deserialization of untrusted data in Windows Server Update Service allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.
digest.title: Microsoft Windows Server Update Service (WSUS) Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Server Update Service (WSUS) Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability

descriptions.value: Deserialization of untrusted data in Windows Server Update Service allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

digest.description: Undocumented administrative accounts were getting created to facilitate access for applications running on board.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.
digest.title: azure-access blu-ic2_firmware

descriptions.value: Undocumented administrative accounts were getting created to facilitate access for applications running on board.This issue affects BLU-IC2: through 1.19.5; BLU-IC4: through 1.19.5.

digest.description: Dell Storage Center - Dell Storage Manager, version(s) 20.1.21, contain(s) an Improper Authentication vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Protection mechanism bypass. Authentication Bypass in DSM Data Collector. An unauthenticated remote attacker can access APIs exposed by ApiProxy.war in DataCollectorEar.ear by using a special SessionKey and UserId. These userid are special users created in compellentservicesapi for special purposes.
digest.title: dell storage_manager Auth Bypass

descriptions.value: Dell Storage Center - Dell Storage Manager, version(s) 20.1.21, contain(s) an Improper Authentication vulnerability. An unauthenticated attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Protection mechanism bypass. Authentication Bypass in DSM Data Collector. An unauthenticated remote attacker can access APIs exposed by ApiProxy.war in DataCollectorEar.ear by using a special SessionKey and UserId. These userid are special users created in compellentservicesapi for special purposes.

digest.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Aksis Technology Inc. Netty ERP allows SQL Injection.This issue affects Netty ERP: before V.1.1000.
digest.title: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Aksis Technology Inc.

descriptions.value: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Aksis Technology Inc. Netty ERP allows SQL Injection.This issue affects Netty ERP: before V.1.1000.

digest.description: Adobe Commerce versions 2.4.9-alpha2, 2.4.8-p2, 2.4.7-p7, 2.4.6-p12, 2.4.5-p14, 2.4.4-p15 and earlier are affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability. A successful attacker can abuse this to achieve session takeover, increasing the confidentiality, and integrity impact to high. Exploitation of this issue does not require user interaction.
digest.title: Adobe Commerce and Magento Improper Input Validation Vulnerability

cve.cisaRequiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
cve.cisaVulnerabilityName: Adobe Commerce and Magento Improper Input Validation Vulnerability

descriptions.value: Adobe Commerce versions 2.4.9-alpha2, 2.4.8-p2, 2.4.7-p7, 2.4.6-p12, 2.4.5-p14, 2.4.4-p15 and earlier are affected by an Improper Input Validation vulnerability. A successful attacker can abuse this to achieve session takeover, increasing the confidentiality, and integrity impact to high. Exploitation of this issue does not require user interaction.

digest.description: Antabot White-Jotter up to commit 9bcadc was discovered to contain an unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability via the component /api/aaa;/../register.
digest.title: Antabot White-Jotter up to commit 9bcadc was discovered to contain an unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability via the c...

descriptions.value: Antabot White-Jotter up to commit 9bcadc was discovered to contain an unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability via the component /api/aaa;/../register.

digest.description: The WooCommerce Designer Pro plugin for WordPress, used by the Pricom - Printing Company & Design Services WordPress theme, is vulnerable to arbitrary file uploads due to missing file type validation in the 'wcdp_save_canvas_design_ajax' function in all versions up to, and including, 1.9.26. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files on the affected site's server which may make remote code execution possible.
digest.title: The WooCommerce Designer Pro plugin for WordPress, used by the Pricom - Printing Company & Design Services WordPress theme, is vulnerable...

descriptions.value: The WooCommerce Designer Pro plugin for WordPress, used by the Pricom - Printing Company & Design Services WordPress theme, is vulnerable to arbitrary file uploads due to missing file type validation in the 'wcdp_save_canvas_design_ajax' function in all versions up to, and including, 1.9.26. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files on the affected site's server which may make remote code execution possible.

digest.description:
A SQL injection vulnerability has been identified in DobryCMS. Improper neutralization of input provided by user into language functionality allows for SQL Injection attacks.

This issue affects older branches of this software.
digest.title: A SQL injection vulnerability has been identified in DobryCMS.

descriptions.value:
A SQL injection vulnerability has been identified in DobryCMS. Improper neutralization of input provided by user into language functionality allows for SQL Injection attacks.

This issue affects older branches of this software.
